DEFENDANT MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. MOTION FOR PARTIAL JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS TO DISMISS SECOND THIRD FOURTH FIFTH SIXTH SEVENTH AND NINTH CAUSES OF ACTION: RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (2ND CAUSE OF ACTION [VIOLATION OF CC 1785.25 ET.SEQ. - INACCURATE CREDIT INFORMATION] - GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CAUSE OF ACTION PREEMPTED AND NO PRIVATE RIGHT OF ACTION UNDER PULVER V. AVCO FINANCIAL, (1986) 182 CA3D. 622. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION [NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS] - GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO PHYSICAL INJURY. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION [INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS] - GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT AND REMOVE PREEMPTED ALLEGATIONS. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION [BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY] - GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO FIDUCIARY DUTY. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION [FRAUD] - GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD MORE SPECIFICALLY. 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION [VIOLATION OF UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES ACT] - GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO REMOVE PREEMPTED ALLEGATIONS. 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION [BREACH OF IMPLIED COVENANT] - GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP ALLEGED). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/JJM/PB) COURT REPORTER JO ANN BRYCE, CSR #3321 (NOTE: 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION IN TENTATIVE RULING REFERS TO THE NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION AS STATED IN THE COMPLAINT, AS THE EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION WAS PASSED OVER IN THE COMPLAINT.)
NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF COUNSEL FILED BY PLTF

For Partial Judgment On The Pleadings To Dismiss Second Third Fourth Fifth Sixth Seventh And Ninth Causes Of Action; Index To Federal Cases And Statutes
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. Motion For Partial Judgment On The Pleadings To Dismiss Second Third Fourth Fifth Sixth Seventh And Ninth Causes Of Action:
APPEAR: George G. Weickhardt, Esq. 543-4800 for deft & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling (2ND CAUSE OF ACTION [VIOLATION OF CC 1785.25 ET.SEQ. - INACCURATE CREDIT INFORMATION] - GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CAUSE OF ACTION PREEMPTED AND NO PRIVATE RIGHT OF ACTION UNDER PULVER V. AVCO FINANCIAL, (1986) 182 CA3D. 622.
3RD CAUSE OF ACTION [NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS] - GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO PHYSICAL INJURY.
4TH CAUSE OF ACTION [INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS] - GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT AND REMOVE PREEMPTED ALLEGATIONS.
5TH CAUSE OF ACTION [BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY] - GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO FIDUCIARY DUTY.
6TH CAUSE OF ACTION [FRAUD] - GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD MORE SPECIFICALLY.
7TH CAUSE OF ACTION [VIOLATION OF UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES ACT] - GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO REMOVE PREEMPTED ALLEGATIONS.
8TH CAUSE OF ACTION [BREACH OF IMPLIED COVENANT] - GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP ALLEGED). Order signed in open court. (302/JJM/PB) Court Reporter Jo Ann Bryce, CSR #3321 (Note: 8th cause of action in tentative ruling refers to the ninth cause of action as stated in the complaint, as the eighth cause of action was passed over in the complaint.)
